transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, First National Bank. This is Amelia.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi Amelia. My card was declined twice this afternoon. Once at a supermarket and once online. I'm not sure what's going on.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me take a quick look at the account. What's your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Looking at your account Mr. Ferreira... I can see the declined transactions. It looks like your card is fine. The issue — actually hold on, I need to verify your identity before I go further. I'm sorry, I should have done that first. Full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Looking properly now — I can see your card has a 3D Secure authentication issue that would explain the online decline. Have you recently changed your phone number?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Actually, yes — about two weeks ago.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's the issue. Your one-time authentication codes are going to your old number. I've updated the mobile number on your account right now. Your next online payment will send the code to the new number.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: That's such a specific issue, I'd never have guessed that.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's a common one after number changes. Your card is fine and should work on your next attempt. Is there anything else?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, that's great. Thank you Amelia.

planted_violations: accessed account and began reviewing details before completing identity verification
